input: Join us for PyData Austin on 2025-03-14 at the Austin Convention Center!
The annual Rustfest is going fully remote this year. Save the date: November 2, 2025.
KubeCon EU kicks off April 1, 2025 in Paris at the Palais des Congres.
Mark your calendar — NeurIPS returns Dec 9 2025, Vancouver Convention Centre.
Tiny local meetup: 'Embedded Rust Night', 2025-06-20, at Nick's garage in Brooklyn.
